arguments.content:
# Phase 3: API Specifications
## AI Workflow Automation for Legal/Consulting Verticals

**Document ID:** API-2024-PHASE3-002  
**Version:** 1.0  
**OpenAPI Version:** 3.1.0

---

## 1. Authentication & Security

### 1.1 Auth Endpoints

```yaml
paths:
  /auth/token:
    post:
      summary: OAuth 2.0 Token Exchange
      description: |
        Supports:
        - `password` grant (email/password)
        - `refresh_token` grant
        - `client_credentials` (M2M)
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/x-www-form-urlencoded:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                grant_type: { type: string, enum: [password, refresh_token, client_credentials] }
                username: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
                refresh_token: { type: string }
      responses:
        200:
          description: Token response
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  access_token: { type: string }
                  refresh_token: { type: string }
                  expires_in: { type: integer }
                  token_type: { type: string, default: Bearer }
                  scope: { type: string }

  /auth/verify-mfa:
    post:
      summary: MFA Challenge Verification
      description: TOTP or SMS verification after primary authentication
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                mfa_token: { type: string }
                code: { type: string, pattern: '^[0-9]{6}$' }

  /auth/sso/{provider}:
    get:
      summary: Initiate SSO flow
      parameters:
        - name: provider
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string, enum: [okta, azure, auth0, onelogin] }
        - name: redirect_uri
          in: query
          required: true
          schema: { type: string, format: uri }
```

### 1.2 API Key Management

```yaml
  /api-keys:
    post:
      summary: Create API key
      security: [bearerAuth: []]
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name, scopes]
              properties:
                name: { type: string, maxLength: 100 }
                scopes: { type: array, items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Scope' } }
                expires_at: { type: string, format: date-time }
                ip_whitelist: { type: array, items: { type: string, format: ipv4 } }
      responses:
        201:
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  key_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
                  api_key: { type: string }  # Shown once
                  prefix: { type: string }
                  created_at: { type: string, format: date-time }

    get:
      summary: List API keys
      security: [bearerAuth: []]
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema: { type: string, enum: [active, revoked, expired] }
```

---

## 2. Core Workflow Automation

### 2.1 Workflow Definitions

```yaml
components:
  schemas:
    Workflow:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, trigger, actions]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid, readOnly: true }
        name: { type: string, maxLength: 200 }
        description: { type: string, maxLength: 2000 }
        status: { type: string, enum: [draft, active, paused, archived] }
        trigger:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Trigger'
        actions:
          type: array
          items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Action' }
        variables:
          type: object  # Template variables
          additionalProperties:
            type: object
            properties:
              type: { type: string }
              required: { type: boolean }
              default: {}
        access_control:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AccessControl'
        created_by: { type: string, format: uuid, readOnly: true }
        created_at: { type: string, format: date-time, readOnly: true }
        updated_at: { type: string, format: date-time, readOnly: true }
        version: { type: integer, readOnly: true }

    Trigger:
      type: object
      required: [type]
      properties:
        type: { type: string, enum: [webhook, scheduled, document_upload, email_received, manual, integration_event] }
        config:
          type: object
          oneOf:
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/ScheduledTriggerConfig'
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/WebhookTriggerConfig'
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentTriggerConfig'

    ScheduledTriggerConfig:
      type: object
      properties:
        cron: { type: string, example: '0 9 * * MON' }
        timezone: { type: string, example: 'America/New_York' }
        enabled: { type: boolean }

    WebhookTriggerConfig:
      type: object
      properties:
        webhook_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        secret: { type: string }
        allowed_ips: { type: array, items: { type: string } }

    DocumentTriggerConfig:
      type: object
      properties:
        folder_id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        mime_types: { type: array, items: { type: string } }
        file_patterns: { type: array, items: { type: string } }
        min_file_size: { type: integer, description: 'bytes' }
        max_file_size: { type: integer, description: 'bytes' }

    Action:
      type: object
      required: [id, type]
      properties:
        id: { type: string, format: uuid }
        type: { type: string, enum: [ai_analysis, document_generation, notification, integration_call, approval

# Phase 3: Technology Stack Recommendations
## AI Workflow Automation for Legal/Consulting Verticals

**Document ID:** STACK-2024-PHASE3-003  
**Version:** 1.0  
**Date:** March 2024

---

## 1. Executive Summary

This document provides technology stack recommendations optimized for:
- **Security & Compliance:** SOC 2, HIPAA, legal industry standards
- **Scalability:** Multi-tenant SaaS architecture
- **AI Integration:** Multi-model LLM support with legal specialization
- **Developer Velocity:** Modern tooling with strong type safety

**Cost Estimate:** ~$8,000-15,000/month at launch (100 active orgs), scaling to ~$50K/month at 1,000 orgs

---

## 2. Frontend Stack

### 2.1 Web Application

| Component | Recommendation | Alternative | Justification |
|-----------|---------------|-------------|---------------|
| **Framework** | React 18 + TypeScript | Vue 3, Svelte | Largest ecosystem, strong typing, mature patterns |
| **Build Tool** | Vite | Webpack, Parcel | 10-20x faster dev builds, native ESM |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS + Headless UI | Chakra UI, MUI | Utility-first efficiency, accessibility built-in |
| **State Management** | Redux Toolkit + RTK Query | Zustand, TanStack Query | Predictable state, built-in caching, type-safe |
| **Forms** | React Hook Form + Zod | Formik, Yup | Performance, Zod for runtime validation
